# Task: Collate bug-ID first-class argument — no --purge-events required

> Task ID: FORGE-S12-T03
> Sprint: [FORGE-S12](../INDEX.md)
> Status: ✅ committed
> Estimate: M

## Description

Make collate.cjs accept bug IDs as a first-class positional argument. `collate.cjs HELLO-B02` should work identically to `collate.cjs HELLO-B02 --purge-events`. Bug IDs are not a side effect of a flag.
